2026-04-23 · Arm B′ archmatch bs=8 (pt-drxe2i2e) — single-seq overfit

STAGE 1 OVERFIT arm B′ obj passes branch feat/dcf @ 426e0b3 · archmatch 58532a2 · motion-init 8c72a09 · handedness-fix 7cdd0f5 · ACP pt-drxe2i2e

Stage-1 single-sequence overfit of HOI3R arm-B′ on subject-01 seq 20200709_141754 cam 836212060125. Archmatch motion heads (CrossBlock + AdaLNBlock + LayerScale, 168/168 transfer), 4RC motion-init, 2-slot handedness, bs=8 cl=4, 3000 steps on 8×H100. The training-time log and a matched-clip eval agree at ~hand 9.6 mm / obj 8.7 mm (obj passes Stage-1 exit, hand marginally misses). A cl=16 eval regresses to 100 mm / 58 mm — the cl=4-trained motion head does not extrapolate to 4× the training sequence length. Per-rank GPU memory held <40% of 80 GiB during training, so Stage 2 has room to bump bs=8 → bs=16.

Headline metrics

Setuphand L2 (mm)obj L2 (mm) CD hand (mm)CD obj (mm)Stage-1 exit
Training, last-20 median (step 2620-3000) 10.759.95 7.577.27 hand marginal (<10); obj PASS
Eval cl=4 (matches training), index 0 9.648.72 —— hand marginal; obj PASS
Eval cl=16 (OOD sequence length) 100.2458.04 —— FAIL (not in training distribution)
Best training step (step 2800) 9.806.21 7.445.61 single-step sample, not stable
Stage-1 exit criteria (from docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-21-feat-dcf-4rc-migration-design.md): hand L2 < 10 mm, obj L2 < 20 mm, CD_hand < 5 mm, CD_obj < 10 mm, measured at matching clip length. Obj passes cleanly; hand marginally misses at 9.64 mm; CD_hand at 7.57 mm does not hit <5 — the noisy single-seq regime is the likely culprit, not the architecture.
cl=16 eval is out-of-distribution. The model was trained on 4-frame clips. A 16-frame inference pass exercises cross-attention + temporal AdaLN contexts the motion head never saw at training. The 10× regression is a sequence-length extrapolation failure, not a scene-loss or handedness artefact. Stage 2 must train at cl=16 if we want full-clip inference, or Stage-1 evals must be reported at cl=4.

Training curves (3000 steps, every 80th point)

Visualizations (cl=16 inference — the OOD case)

Three camera-view videos + one interactive Plotly scatter3d. All use the 4RC pristine scene .npz (logs/exp1_4rc_dexycb/20200709-subject-01_20200709_141754_836212060125.npz) paired with the cl=16 predictions (logs/exp_eval/pt-drxe2i2e/predictions.pt). The hand/obj meshes below are misaligned because the model is operating OOD (trained cl=4 → evaluated cl=16); this is the rendering pipeline, not a final quality claim. The matched-clip numbers in the table above are the honest quality signal.

Interactive Plotly scatter3d (16-frame slider)

Drag to orbit, scroll to zoom, slider to scrub frames. Scene points RGB-sampled from the input frame; hand (red) / object (blue) at marker size 1.5.

Next steps

PriorityTaskRationale
P1 Stage 2 subject-01 multi-seq at bs=16 cl=4 (double throughput) Per-rank GPU mem <40% at bs=8 → ~60-65% at bs=16 (projected). If the memory probe confirms <70% headroom, bs=24 is the next step.
P1 Stage 2 at cl=16 (not cl=4) if the evaluation target is 16-frame inference The cl=4-trained motion head does not extrapolate to cl=16 (10× regression above). Either train at the inference length, or report Stage-1 at cl=4 only.
P2 Optional arm A′ (random init, archmatch arch, bs=4) to isolate arch from batch-size confound Current three arms (A random bs=4 / B 4RC-init bs=4 / B′ 4RC-init bs=8) conflate arch with batch size. Stage 2 is the real signal; deferring.
Artefacts on disk (debug container, /mnt/afs/haonan/hoi3r/HOI3R/.worktrees/feat-dcf/):
  • logs/overfit_armBprime_archmatch_bs8/model_final.pt (8.4 GiB) — trained checkpoint
  • logs/overfit_armBprime_archmatch_bs8/history.json — 150 logged points (every 20 steps)
  • logs/exp_eval/pt-drxe2i2e/predictions.pt — cl=16 eval
  • logs/exp_eval/pt-drxe2i2e_cl4/predictions.pt — cl=4 eval
  • logs/exp_eval_viz/pt-drxe2i2e/ — 3 MP4s + scene_interactive.html
